meaning: adv.涓嶆効鎰忓湴,涓嶆儏鎰垮湴
examples: He accepted his orders very unwillingly.
We reached the stream, and they unwillingly walked ahead.
The lady unwillingly replied: "All right, Clara, but I shall also speak a few words to Mr. Sesemann."
Whatever path they choose, the rest of the nation will have to follow, however unwillingly.
You will leave the company, perhaps unwillingly due to illness, perhaps willingly because your interests have changed.
